corrected_grounded_evidence.reason: The original 13140df Week 10 evidence used scripted diagnostic timelines and was not valid grounded evidence. The corrected implementation derives attempts, progress, replay outcomes, demonstration effects, prediction evidence, classification, and proposal generation from executed Nursery episodes.
